features: SLEEK SHELL DESIGN - This gorgeous girls mermaid shell design detangler brush is one of the most fashion forward accessories. Not only is it a great detangling hair brush but it also looks super cute! The unique design delivers painless detangling and smoothing and comes in a variety of gorgeous colours. It is also designed to be palm-friendly for comfortable fit.

UNIQUE SHAPE FOR EASY USE - The glossy half-moon shaped brush fits into your palm perfectly and it is easy to hold whilst detangling your hair. The flexible, painless 3 different length bristles will not only detangle but also smooth your hair in long, luscious locks. Makes for the perfect accompaniment to a detangling spray for ultimate smoothing and shine.

SUITABLE FOR ALL HAIR TYPES - This unique design hair brush is perfect for adults and children. Made to suit all hair types, you can use the glossy product on long, short, thick, thin, straight or curly hair. Suitable to use on wet or dry hair. This tamer works on hair extensions for ultimate styling and is more stylish than your standard paddle hair brush!

HIGH QUALITY PRODUCT - Improve your hair health with our high quality mermaid detangling brush. The enhanced design will leave your hair looking shiny and healthy preventing any hair breakage and reducing fizziness. No more knots and painful experiences. Our brand guarantees that all of the items have been designed to be strong and sturdy to provide durability.

MAKES FOR A GREAT GIFT: Looking for the perfect beauty accessory to give her? This detangle hair brush for women makes a great gift for Christmas or Birthdays. Small enough to fit in a handbag which makes it a perfect travel hairbrush. Helps remove frizz and tames tangled hair leaving you with a silky, smooth and sleek look.
description: Upgrade your day-to-day essential and detangle your hair in style with our glossy mermaid hair brush. Perfect size for easy storing. Tuck it away into your hand bag, backpack or tote bag. Made out of solid material it cant’ be damaged by being bashed around. Share this unique beauty accessory with your friends and family.
